creator: trust_no_1@libero.it
text:
Hello,
deskutils/calibre does not compile on my 10.2 system.
BTW: I have installed calibre version 1.48 and wanted to upgrade it to the latest version.

What I have done is the following:

root@dukefleed:~ # svn update /usr/ports
Updated to revision 408947.

root@dukefleed:~ # cd /usr/ports/deskutils/calibre
